setup.note: Microsoft Work IQ User/Profile remote MCP server, currently preview. Provides self-knowledge and organizational awareness such as profile, manager, direct reports, and user search. Requires Microsoft 365 Copilot license, tenant admin enablement/consent, tenant ID, and Entra OAuth client. Reference source: Microsoft Work IQ User reference search result and https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-agent-365/tooling-servers-overview

inputs.label: Microsoft Entra OAuth Client
inputs.description: Client ID, and optionally client secret, for the Microsoft Entra app registration.
